query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS published, MIN(wordCount) AS min_w, MAX(wordCount) AS max_w, ROUND(AVG(wordCount)) AS avg_w, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(publishedAt)) AS distinct_days FROM articles WHERE status='published';
